cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out where the balls are at the end of the game. There are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. They start with specific colored balls, and then they swap in a certain order. I need to track each swap step by step to see who ends up with which ball. Let me write down the initial positions first. Starting positions: - Alice: black ball - Bob: brown ball - Claire: blue ball - Dave: white ball - Eve: green ball Now, the swaps happen in this order: 1. Dave and Eve swap balls. 2. Bob and Claire swap balls. 3. Claire and Alice swap balls. 4. Dave and Eve swap balls again. 5. Eve and Claire swap balls. Let me go through each step one by one. **First swap: Dave and Eve** - Dave had white, Eve had green. - After swapping, Dave has green and Eve has white. So now: - Alice: black - Bob: brown - Claire: blue - Dave: green (from Eve) - Eve: white (from Dave) **Second swap: Bob and Claire** - Bob has brown, Claire has blue. - After swapping, Bob has blue and Claire has brown. Now: - Alice: black - Bob: blue - Claire: brown - Dave: green - Eve: white **Third swap: Claire and Alice** - Claire has brown, Alice has black. - After swapping, Claire has black and Alice
